extensionDescription.message: Locks and masks ChatGPT sidebar history, projects, pinned chats, library, and search without blocking the active chat.

pinHelpRequired.message: Required before you can enable protection.

pinHelpExisting.message: Leave blank to keep your existing PIN.

securityNote.message: A privacy layer for shoulder-surfing and casual access—not account-level security.

errorChoosePin.message: Choose a PIN with at least 4 characters.

errorPinLength.message: PIN must have at least 4 characters.

errorSetPinBeforeLocking.message: Set a PIN and save settings before locking.

errorTurnOnBeforeLocking.message: Turn on sidebar protection before locking.

pinModalDescription.message: Enter your PIN to unlock sidebar history for 5 minutes.

tooManyAttempts.message: Too many attempts. Try again in $SECONDS$ seconds.

setPinFirst.message: Set a PIN in the extension popup first.
